strengths: 15+ years in software engineering with full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure experience
Proven expertise in cloud-native development (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) and AI-related tooling (MCP, agentic workflows)
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and technical mentorship (e.g., Refactoring Dojos, Selenium course)
concerns: No explicit AI/ML product or platform built with AI mentioned in resume
Lacks advanced AI-related degree (MS/PhD) or recognized AI expertise in publications/talks
Limited evidence of entrepreneurial/startup experience within larger organizations
response.justification: The candidate meets the minimum 15-year requirement and has relevant cloud/AI tooling experience (e.g., AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq, real-time systems at Dunnhumby). However, there is no concrete evidence of AI product development or recognized AI expertise (e.g., no PhD/MS in AI, no AI-focused publications, or AI-powered platforms). Leadership is demonstrated but not directly tied to AI strategy.
